description: Use this API to return an array of real values for the voltage droop controls. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.3.0. ierr, rarray = avoltagedroopreal(string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the voltage droop quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

string.description: voltage at the regulated bus of voltage droop control.
Q injection to the regulated bus of voltage droop control, Q is positive if the Q enters into the bus.
desired Q injection to the regulated bus of voltage droop control, Q is positive if the Q enters into the bus.
total Q outputs of the generators in the voltage droop control.
